sections.title: A: Original course practice

sections.title: B: Original key word transformation practice
sections.instructions: Complete the second sentence so that it keeps the same meaning as the first.

items.sentence:
Mia began the class project before the lesson on Review: Block 11 – Units 21 & 22. **LINE**
The class project ...... before the lesson on Review: Block 11 – Units 21 & 22.

Leo began the study group before the lesson on Review: Block 11 – Units 21 & 22. **BOTTOM**
The study group ...... before the lesson on Review: Block 11 – Units 21 & 22.
items.answer: from the bottom of my heart
